programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin
programme.desc: Samantha gets back together with Richard; Carrie has a dry spell in her love life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Plus One Is the Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Samantha organizes Carrie's book-launch party; Miranda doesn't tell her date about Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Carrie obsesses over a comment made about Aidan; Samantha baby-sits Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Journey
programme.desc: Hoping to see Big, Carrie travels to a book reading in San Francisco with Samantha.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Love a Charade
programme.desc: The girls head to the Hamptons for the memorable wedding of a supposedly gay singer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: To Market, to Market
programme.desc: Carrie calms her nerves over a first date with a fellow author by going on another date.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Great Sexpectations
programme.desc: Carrie is disappointed by Jack's lacklustre performance between the sheets.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Perfect Present
programme.desc: Carrie spends a sleepless night at Berger's apartment; Samantha meets her waiter again.

programme.title: Movie: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A hard-working New Yorker and a self-reliant Mexican-American unexpectedly fall in love.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Celebrity Chef Danie whips up a star worthy dish.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashian Curse
programme.desc: Khloé heads to Napa with Kourtney and Kris where her tough decision to move forward with her divorce is made even tougher by Kris's actions. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to rid himself of the alleged Kardashian Curse.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his engagement announcement, Rob has another piece of news that will change the family forever. Meanwhile, Kylie struggles with anxiety from being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Iron Age
programme.desc: Iron Chef meets Beat Bobby Flay when Jose Garces takes on the newest Iron Chef, Stephanie Izard. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Simon Majumdar decide whose cuisine reigns supreme.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Artist-turned-chef Melissa Mayer and former sports reporter Jen Royle intend to prove that even those who start late in life can compete with the best of the best!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cream Of The Crop
programme.desc: The kitchen comes alive when Food Network's Katie Lee and Valerie Bertinelli team up to see Bobby Flay fall. It's up to them to make the call when Chef Chris Henry from Massachusetts battles Buffalo, N.Y.'s Chef Steve Gedra for a chance at the champ!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Open Grill Season
programme.desc: Top Chef host Gail Simmons and The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson are striking while the iron is hot in tonight's battle! Here to tame the flame are Brooklyn's own Brandon Byrd and top Floridian chef Nicolay Adinaguev.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Best of Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts of Halloween Baking Championship, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking and spine-tingling ingredients.

programme.title: Kids Halloween Baking Championship: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Four fan favorites from Kids Baking Championship are back to bake their way through two chilling challenges for the chance to win $10,000, and the title of Kids Halloween Baking Champion!

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: Four fan-favorite kid bakers return for a Halloween-themed competition and battle it out for a baker's dream prize package that includes a blast chiller. The kids enter the kitchen to find Duff Goldman stuck in a spider web.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's Gonna Be Jarring
programme.desc: Style expert Carson Kressley teams up with Chef Anne Burrell to point out Bobby Flay's fashion and food faux pas. Two Italian authorities, chefs Kevin Sweeney and Nicco Muratore, are ready to prove that their food is trendsetting.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, Man vs. Food's Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby vs.

programme.title: The Flay List: Pizza
programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay take a walk through the picturesque West Village and head to Bobby's pizza pick, Joe's Pizza, for a classic New York slice. From there, they hit up one of Bobby's favorite gelato spots, Grom.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fright Club
programme.desc: There's a thrill of fear in the air when TV personality Jesse Palmer and Food Network's Eddie Jackson step into Bobby Flay's arena. Frank "The Bull" Terzoli and the City of Brotherly Love's John Patterson compete.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Driving Fence Posts
programme.desc: There's a great sack lunch and a bunch of pranks in store as Ree Drummond’s family tackles a big fence post project on the ranch. She makes some strip steak sandwiches with grilled onions and over easy eggs. Plus, shortcut mini pecan pies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Parmesan
programme.desc: Ina prepares lemon Parmesan chicken and orecchiette with broccoli rabe and sausage.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Herbs All Ways
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favourite herbs and tips for using them to amp up the flavour of dishes. Rosemary, oregano and mint highlight her Pork Souvlaki with Radish Tzatziki and Pitas for a delectable, easy meal.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten's got weeknight dinners covered, pro-style! There are Roasted Salmon Tacos with avocado salsa and a super quick slaw, then Cider Roasted Pork Tenderloin with an incredible make-ahead marinade and served with Fig Chutney.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: It Must Be Friday
programme.desc: Ina Garten's shaking things up, making Skillet-Roasted Lemon Chicken and serving it with amped-up Roasted Broccolini on the side.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: Dino's Pasta Factory
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her Aunt Raffy visit the Southern Italian town of Torre Annunziata, where Giada's great-grandparents once owned a pasta factory.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hitting the Road
programme.desc: Ree and her daughters are going on a college tour, so she's stocking up the fridge for the guys. She's made them a breakfast burrito kit, Pasta alla ladd, chipotle ranch dressing and cookies and cream cups for a treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Request
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a fast food joint in Charlotte, a neighbourhood favourite for grilled cheese sandwiches in Lakewood and a British Pub in Houston serving shepherd's pie made from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy visits Alamaba for homemade gumbo and a super spicy crawfish boil.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Hook Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries a chili and tator-tot pizza at a Kansas City joint run by a sculptor.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Topsy
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Louise is determined to take down her Thomas Edison-obsessed science teacher by recreating a famous experiment where Thomas Edison electrocutes an elephant named Topsy.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Purple Rain-Union
programme.desc: Looking to reclaim her past glory, Linda reunites with her old band to perform at their high school reunion. When a former female classmate tries to impress Bob, he becomes very self-conscious about the unwanted attention.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Wharf Horse (or How Bob Saves/ Destroys the Town)
programme.desc: Motivated by the promise of a new beachside burger joint, Bob conspires with Felix to convince Mr. Fischoeder to sell Wonder Wharf. Meanwhile, Tina protests the destruction of the wharf's carousel by chaining herself to it.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: World Wharf II: The Wharfening (or How Bob Saves/ Destroys the Town)
programme.desc: It's Linda and the kids to the rescue when Felix takes desperate measures, and puts Bob and Mr. Fischoeder in danger.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Work Hard or Die Trying, Girl

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Horse Rider-er
programme.desc: After finally convincing Bob and Linda to send her to horse camp, Tina realizes she has to part ways with Jericho, her imaginary horse. Meanwhile, Linda decides to create a restaurant camp in an attempt to make things fair for Gene and Louise.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Flu-ouise
programme.desc: When the youngest Belcher comes down with an epic case of the flu, Linda has a mishap as she tries to deliver Louise's favourite toy to her daughter's bedside.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Something Old, Something New, Something Bob Caters for You

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: All Hands on Deck

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Low Wattage Cottage
programme.desc: DeRon and Page tackle a tiny brick cottage in the historic neighborhood of Inglewood, hoping it will be a quick flip. But when they start the demolition, they realize the house is in much worse shape than they thought.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Downsize to Maximize
programme.desc: Page and DeRon get the chance to flip a cozy brick cottage in an up-and-coming neighborhood. However, in order to make the most of its limited space, they must downsize the home from three bedrooms to two, which is quite the risky thing to do with a flip.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Family Contemplates Financial or Emotional Investments in Their Home
programme.desc: A family considers a financial or emotional investment.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Family of Nine No Longer Fits in Their Home

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Torn Between Fixing Up Their Home in the City or Moving to the Country for More Land
programme.desc: Thomas and Sarah purchased their home near the city in a neighbourhood close to where Thomas grew up. Thomas loves the location, but Sarah feels the cramped quarters confine her. She wants an open concept, but it must be in the country.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Laundry Overload
programme.desc: With two children and a third on the way, life for Breanne and Justin is fun but hectic. Justin is already overwhelmed with the daily struggles of living in a small house, including limited laundry space and bathroom availability.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Overseas Oversight

programme.title: Island Hunters: A Belated Honeymoon in Tahiti

programme.title: Island Hunters: From the Desert to Belize

programme.desc: When Brooks lands a job in Africa and has to be there in two days, he and Jessie are forced to move up their wedding.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Jessie: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Jessie gets two wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket. Bertram bonds with a talking coffee maker who Luke tries to steal to help him study for his Spanish test.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Story Time
programme.desc: When Teddy and Amy discover that a mom in Charlie's book club is a publisher of children's books, they each try to prove they can write the next bestseller. Meanwhile, PJ starts dishing out relationship advice to his Kwikki Chikki customers.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Return to Super Adventure Land
programme.desc: While on a family trip to Super Adventure Land, Gabe and Amy are asked to appear in a commercial for the park, but Amy takes the role too seriously and is recast. Meanwhile, Emmett helps Teddy get a job at Adventure Land as a princess to his frog prince.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Teddy on Ice
programme.desc: Teddy joins Ivy at her family's lakeside cabin, only to discover that it's really just a cramped ice-fishing hut. Meanwhile, PJ and Gabe break Mrs. Dabney's satellite and are forced to invite her over to watch her daily soaps.

programme.title: Bunk'd: For Love and Money
programme.desc: Lou falls for a handsome young lumberjack but Emma and Zuri are suspicious of him. Ravi and Jorge go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Live From Camp Kikiwaka
programme.desc: When the kids realize how outdated the Camp Kikiwaka website is, they decide to do a live stream to show people how great the camp is.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Pharaoh
programme.desc: A young historian gets akumatized into the all-powerful Pharaoh. He wants to bring an Ancient Egyptian princess back to life by sacrificing Alya. To save her, Ladybug and Cat Noir must face an army of mummies outside the Louvre!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Mousekersize!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Vampirina: Hiccupire / Uncle Bigfoot
programme.desc: When Vee gets a case of the vampire hiccups, Poppy and Bridget struggle to find a way to scare them away. Boris' old college roommate, Bigfoot, comes to stay at the Scare B&B.

programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Byrom

programme.title: Snapped: Brynn Hartman
programme.desc: The celebrity murder that shocked a nation, one of the country's leading comedians is gunned down in his own home.

programme.title: Snapped: Kwaneta Harris
programme.desc: A foreclosure leads police to a concrete grave and a twisted plot of deception, fraud and murder, as one woman goes to extraordinary lengths to avoid justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Emma Raine
programme.desc: The family of a former soldier questions whether or not his death was a tragic coincidence when they learn of a suspicious detail from his wife's past.

programme.title: Snapped: Mia Gonzales
programme.desc: A quiet California cul-de-sac becomes a crime scene when a couple’s domestic drama reaches a deadly climax.

programme.title: Snapped: Dee Dee Moore
programme.desc: A millionaire lottery winner goes missing, leaving his financial advisor in the spotlight.

programme.title: Snapped: Kathryn Briggs
programme.desc: A decorated soldier falls in love with a beautiful model online. Tragically, after he returns home from serving two tours overseas, he's brutally murdered in his own home. A web of deceit unfolds as the picture of an unlikely killer emerges.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Faithful
programme.desc: When a Catholic Church sexton is found murdered, the detectives search for a drug addict.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Extra Man
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death turns out to be a European con man who swindled investors.

programme.title: Snapped: Georgia Watson
programme.desc: When a man is ambushed by a firestorm of bullets outside his home, investigators follow a twisted trail of suspects to a vindictive mastermind.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Devil's Bathtub
programme.desc: Craig and Laura Rideout appeared happy but, after a contentious separation revealed an ugly secret, one of them would soon be dead. Clues pointed to four possible killers and left investigators wondering if this murder was all in the family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything
programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Night of the New Moon
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcomed a baby boy, but then, their marriage crumbled. A bitter custody battle followed. Fearing for her safety, Diane turned to a man skilled in self-defense but, it turns out, someone else was in grave danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man

programme.desc: Fearful that the romance between him and Claire is fizzling, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentine’s Day back on track. Jay and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness.

programme.title: Modern Family: Basketball
programme.desc: After choking at last year's charity basketball game, Phil has been training all year to redeem himself. However, when NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan attend the game and start making bets, Phil tries to not buckle under the pressure.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pig Moon Rising
programme.desc: During a quick workout session in the garage, Mitchell accidentally knocks over an urn filled with the ashes of Cam's beloved pet pig Lilly. He quickly attempts to cover up his blunder and devises an appropriate cover-up.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Take the Money and Run
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: After the chief of logistics for a naval weapons station collapses on the job, the NCIS team must determine if this is a terror threat or a stress-induced breakdown.

programme.title: NCIS: Date With Destiny
programme.desc: Sloane is adamant that a man who held her hostage and tortured her years ago in Afghanistan, and was believed to have been killed following her rescue, is alive and in D.C.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Info Wars
programme.desc: Benson and Barba must put their political beliefs aside when a female pundit is assaulted during a protest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: In Loco Parentis
programme.desc: Carisi opens a police investigation when his niece reports a classmate for sexual assault and Stone learns that there are no perfect witnesses when it comes to sex crimes.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dare
programme.desc: A girl's tragic death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: A student disappears on a school trip to New York City, leading cops to race to find a masked man. Fin and Stone get visits from family.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Service
programme.desc: The SVU must break through military red tape when a soldier is suspected of sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Guardian
programme.desc: Fin investigates a man's claim that his sister was gang raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mama
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims she was raped but her illness casts doubt on the case. Fin's sergeant orders come in.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Remember Me
programme.desc: A young woman takes a man hostage at gunpoint and Benson makes a dangerous move to diffuse the situation. The SVU discovers the shocking motive behind the abduction.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Don't Care
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Jake Nodar and Melissa Miller take on a punishing Florida swamp teeming with poisonous snakes and aggressive alligators. When one of the survivalists becomes disoriented local authorities are called in to conduct an all-out search.

programme.title: Naked and Frozen: Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Three hundred miles from the Arctic Circle, two naked survivalists combat hypothermia and frostbite in the snow-covered tundra of Alaska's boreal forest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah, two Naked and Afraid superfans battle the oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks. Scorching temperatures lead to severe dehydration and force a desperate fan to risk illness by drinking unsanitary fluids.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Stalked on the Savannah
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Two survivalists fight the heat in Central Brazil's sandstone desert while protecting themselves from vicious wasps, jaguars and rattlesnakes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah, two Naked and Afraid superfans battle the oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks. Scorching temperatures lead to severe dehydration and force a desperate fan to risk illness by drinking unsanitary fluids.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Edge of Madness
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure: Into the Storm
programme.desc: Darrell and the team have to deal with a storm as they discover gold ore in an old wreck.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure: Striking Gold
programme.desc: The team discovers ornate artifacts that indicate the location of a 16th century captain's quarters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Gold Strike
programme.desc: The crew cleans up and does a final gold weigh-in for the season. Then Dustin leads them to a new mine site he's had his eye on that proves instantly to have massive gold potential.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future
programme.desc: An extended sneak peek of the all-new season of Gold Rush reveals a crisis in the Klondike forcing the miners in new directions. We go back to the beginning, nine years ago, revealing the pivotal moments that got each man to the crossroads they now face.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: BattleBots: Live to Die Another Day
programme.desc: When a surprising twist blows the competition wide open, the world's greatest bots redouble their efforts to win a spot in the knockout round.

programme.title: American Pickers: Beetle in a Haystack

programme.title: American Pickers: Picked a Peck of Pepper

programme.title: American Pickers: Hydro Homestead
programme.desc: The guys try to buy from a super-handyman on a unique homestead, but his deal-making could end the pick before it gets going.

programme.title: Decoding the Past: The Other Nostradamus
programme.desc: Well known as the other Nostradamus, Edgar Cayce's predictions and prophecies were passed over, unfulfilled until years after. These visions included foretelling the Great Depression, predicting the death of U.S. Presidents and the Second World War.

programme.title: Nostradamus: 21st Century Prophecies Revealed

programme.desc: Some believe that the signs of the Apocalypse is all around us.

programme.desc: It's graduation day for the fledgling penguins that have spent six months in their nursery being cared for by the keepers.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy

programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Only Two Remain
programme.desc: A husband is bludgeoned to death in his home. His wife and father-in-law claim it was self-defense. But when investigators take a closer at the crime scene, the story of what really happened that night will be put into question.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: When Laura Miller vanishes, police locate her remains along a Texas highway where over two dozen other young women have also turned up dead for over three decades.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Stranger on the Hill
programme.desc: For college sweethearts Ashley Freeman and Mike Grinnan, a late-night drive to a secluded Texas hill leads to a night of terror and a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A Killer in the Swamp
programme.desc: A young woman relocates to the marshes of the Ocala National Forest in Florida in search of some peace and a fresh start, but what once appeared to be a remote paradise, soon shows its true colors.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar: Narco King

programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away

programme.desc: Style expert Carson Kressley teams up with Chef Anne Burrell to point out Bobby Flay's fashion and food faux pas. Two Italian authorities, chefs Kevin Sweeney and Nicco Muratore, are ready to prove that their food is trendsetting.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, Man vs. Food's Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby vs.

programme.title: The Flay List: Pizza
programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay take a walk through the picturesque West Village and head to Bobby's pizza pick, Joe's Pizza, for a classic New York slice. From there, they hit up one of Bobby's favorite gelato spots, Grom.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fright Club
programme.desc: There's a thrill of fear in the air when TV personality Jesse Palmer and Food Network's Eddie Jackson step into Bobby Flay's arena. Frank "The Bull" Terzoli and the City of Brotherly Love's John Patterson compete.

programme.title: Kids Halloween Baking Championship: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Four fan favorites from Kids Baking Championship are back to bake their way through two chilling challenges for the chance to win $10,000, and the title of Kids Halloween Baking Champion!

programme.title: Mystery Diners: Skating on Thin Ice
programme.desc: After noticing missing food and merchandise, Shauna and Joe, owners of Epic Rollertainment in Murrieta, Calif., contact Charles Stiles for help. Mystery Diners Kendall and Eliot discover an ever bigger problem when the roller rink closes at night.

programme.title: Mystery Diners: From Russia Without Love
programme.desc: Before investing his life savings in a new Russian restaurant, an aspiring restaurateur asks Charles Stiles to investigate the Russian chef he plans to go into business with.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Driving Fence Posts
programme.desc: There's a great sack lunch and a bunch of pranks in store as Ree Drummond’s family tackles a big fence post project on the ranch. She makes some strip steak sandwiches with grilled onions and over easy eggs. Plus, shortcut mini pecan pies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Parmesan
programme.desc: Ina prepares lemon Parmesan chicken and orecchiette with broccoli rabe and sausage.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Herbs All Ways
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favourite herbs and tips for using them to amp up the flavour of dishes. Rosemary, oregano and mint highlight her Pork Souvlaki with Radish Tzatziki and Pitas for a delectable, easy meal.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten's got weeknight dinners covered, pro-style! There are Roasted Salmon Tacos with avocado salsa and a super quick slaw, then Cider Roasted Pork Tenderloin with an incredible make-ahead marinade and served with Fig Chutney.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: It Must Be Friday
programme.desc: Ina Garten's shaking things up, making Skillet-Roasted Lemon Chicken and serving it with amped-up Roasted Broccolini on the side.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: Dino's Pasta Factory
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her Aunt Raffy visit the Southern Italian town of Torre Annunziata, where Giada's great-grandparents once owned a pasta factory.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hitting the Road
programme.desc: Ree and her daughters are going on a college tour, so she's stocking up the fridge for the guys. She's made them a breakfast burrito kit, Pasta alla ladd, chipotle ranch dressing and cookies and cream cups for a treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Request
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a fast food joint in Charlotte, a neighbourhood favourite for grilled cheese sandwiches in Lakewood and a British Pub in Houston serving shepherd's pie made from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy visits Alamaba for homemade gumbo and a super spicy crawfish boil.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Hook Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries a chili and tator-tot pizza at a Kansas City joint run by a sculptor.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate violent activity in New Franken, Wisconsin, that's ruining a woman's hopes of opening her dream business.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: While remodelling their home in Salt Lake City, April James, her fiancé Matt Brody, and April's two sons start to hear strange noises. Soon forced out by violent apparitions, the family calls in a psychic to clean house and banish the evil forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: When a demon sets loose in a Connecticut home, a 12-year-old boy named David bears the brunt of its wrath. Only an exorcism will save David's soul as he somehow gets punch and thrown around while an old man watches him with menacing hooves and horns.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: With a new job and a new place, Randy Ervin's life seems to be on track, until he unearths an Indian burial ground. As the door opens to the dark side of the supernatural, Randy wonders if he is seeing things, until demons begin to threaten his family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Soon after musician Bobby Mackay starts a nightclub in an abandoned slaughterhouse, ghosts assault his wife and his employee Carl. The new owners quickly turn to a psychic and a minister when Carl begins to suffer from signs of demonic possession.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Demons
programme.desc: Living in Taiwan, an American family is distraught over paranormal activity in their mansion. A Taoist Catholic priest explains the house was designed, according to Chinese feng shui, to empower the spirits of the dead and torment the living.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: The staff of an old pub discovers that the spirit of a mischievous little girl haunts their building. The staff unleashed the ghost of her killer when they attempt to contact her, and must decide whether or not to risk their own lives to save her soul.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Stone Lion Inn
programme.desc: The crew investigates the Stone Lion Inn in Guthrie, Oklahoma, where it is said the owner performs satanic rituals in the local cemetery. Zak also uncovers the truth about what happened to a famous outlaw.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Freak Show Murder House
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate the site of a 1996 double murder in Los Angeles' Chatsworth neighborhood. The guys gather chilling evidence of paranormal activity and are lured away from the location against their will.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: True Colors
programme.desc: Rebecca learns the results of Zied's background check. Avery delivers some devastating news to her mom. Benjamin finally meets Akinyi's father. Angela and Michael try to make amends. Darcey and Tom's relationship takes an interesting turn in Albania.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Sperm IS The Baby
programme.desc: Rosa and Rebecca finally meet at Rilah's baby shower. Tyra isn't comfortable visiting Alex's family with Alex and the baby. McKayla goes to the hospital to be induced. Jessica and Nate find out Chloe and Max broke their only rule.

programme.title: Birth Moms
programme.desc: Follow the lives of three pregnant women living at an adoption center in Utah and meet the prospective parents.

programme.title: Obese and Pregnant

programme.title: Obese and Expecting

programme.title: Meet the Putmans: Under One Roof
programme.desc: At the Putman house, no one leaves home, not even when they get married and have their own kids. Three generations, 10 adults, 15 kids -- 25 people, all living under one roof, sharing everything from one bank account to only two bathrooms.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Ready or Not, Here Come the Quints!
programme.desc: Liz, Daniel, and their two-year old son Rowan become a family of eight with the anticipated arrival of quintuplets.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: No Finish Line With Nine
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric stress about hosting a big 5K charity event, while also making sure the six babies stay on track developmentally. Major decisions need to be made, knowing Courtney's maternity leave pay is ending and they may be losing their nanny soon.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Our Home Is Sick
programme.desc: The quints have their first sleepover at the Mills when the Busbys are forced to leave their home for a few days. Fearing for the girls' health after prolonged exposure to mold, Danielle and Adam bring them to the doctor to find out if they are at risk.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Get Schooled
programme.desc: Thanksgiving is right around the corner, but celebrating is the last thing on the Busbys' minds. Tensions run high between Adam and Danielle as they continue the hunt for a new house and the quints undergo their first school testing.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Kelly/ Lauren
programme.desc: Kelly's history of miscarriages keeps her from telling her mom. Lauren is afraid of her father's explosive reaction.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Carmen/ Jerline
programme.desc: Carmen is a struggling single mother unexpectedly pregnant with her second baby. Jerline and her husband are unemployed and living with her mother while trying to get their lives together.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Blackout, Bleedout
programme.desc: Two fishermen get stuck on the same lure; a cheerleader with a sprained finger nearly dies of an unexpected cause; and a power outage in the hospital foils the ER team's effort to get a dying patient to the O.R.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Never Say Die

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: A Love Worth Fighting For
programme.desc: Two teens from feuding families are determined to get married, even though their mothers try to keep them apart.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: From Jail to Wedding Veil

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Family Annihilator
programme.desc: After being turned down for a promotion, Brad Bishop used a sledgehammer to brutally murder his wife, his three young sons and his own mother. Although there have been multiple sightings, Brad Bishop has evaded the authorities for over 30 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea

programme.title: Bunk'd: Reversal of Fortune
programme.desc: The counselors clean out the storage and find a fortune teller machine. They pull it out and it reads something important will go missing and a sister will betray another sister.

programme.title: Raven's Home: School House Trap
programme.desc: Just as they are about to advance in the Radio Eclipse Competition, Raven threatens to end the band over Booker's bad grades.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: General Nuisance
programme.desc: When Rachel's old army buddy, Robert, comes to stay with the family for a few days, his exhausting GI Joe-like personality rubs Blair and Byron the wrong way.

programme.title: Jessie: Lights, Camera, Distraction!
programme.desc: When Jessie becomes frustrated she can't land any acting gigs, she takes matters into her own hands by participating in a 24 hour film festival. She recruits the kids to help her direct, shoot and edit it, but things get complicated.

programme.title: Jessie: The Telltale Duck
programme.desc: Jessie agrees to accompany Bertram to his high school reunion, so he can show his former classmates how successful he has become.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Be the Heart or the Hammer?
programme.desc: Cooper and Cami learn that their local ice rink is going to be sold and torn down. Jenna asks for Charlotte and Ollie's help to sell a house.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Mo' Grandmas, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: When Grandma Maya comes to visit, Sydney loves spending time with her so much that Grandma Judy feels a little left out.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Most Interesting Mom in the World
programme.desc: While doing a school report on their mom, Booker and Nia lie about Raven’s life to make their presentation seem more exciting.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Bringing Up Toilet
programme.desc: Blair and Owen become enamored with the family’s new high-tech talking toilet. Rachel and Byron try to prove to their kids that they're still cool enough to hang out with.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Griff is in the House!
programme.desc: The Ross kids leave their New York penthouse and return to Camp Kikiwaka for the summer where they find, to their surprise, an unexpected camp addition and the Woodchuck cabin's new startling counselor.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Dance in My Pants
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka hosts its annual dance which has Tiffany and Zuri hopeful that they'll dance with a cute boy. Emma learns that Lou and Xander have a history.

programme.title: Jessie: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: When Brooks lands a job in Africa and has to be there in two days, he and Jessie are forced to move up their wedding.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Jessie: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Jessie gets two wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket. Bertram bonds with a talking coffee maker who Luke tries to steal to help him study for his Spanish test.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Story Time
programme.desc: When Teddy and Amy discover that a mom in Charlie's book club is a publisher of children's books, they each try to prove they can write the next bestseller. Meanwhile, PJ starts dishing out relationship advice to his Kwikki Chikki customers.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Return to Super Adventure Land
programme.desc: While on a family trip to Super Adventure Land, Gabe and Amy are asked to appear in a commercial for the park, but Amy takes the role too seriously and is recast. Meanwhile, Emmett helps Teddy get a job at Adventure Land as a princess to his frog prince.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Teddy on Ice

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.
