programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Sunken Sloop/ Pups Save a Wiggly Whale
programme.desc: Sid the Pirate and his First Mate Arrby have taken the sunken sloop. A wiggling whale has knocked the diving bell upside down and it's stuck in the sand at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Jungle Penguins/ Pups Save a Freighter
programme.desc: An ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle. Now the pups must get them back to their frosty home. Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after. Now a freighter is headed straight for Seal Island.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble/ Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. The pups need to work together to lift Olivia the ostrich from the canyon to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Bedtime/ Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out. Chickaletta laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Royal Kitties
programme.desc: The Royal kitties are kidnapped on their way to Adventure Bay for a special visit. Ryder needs all the pups to help Chase investigate this case in an ultimate police rescue.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
programme.desc: When searching for elusive rumble top tigers, the Turbots fall into a cave deep inside a volcano. The PAW Patrol does a paratrooper style rescue from Skye's Ultimate copter in this Ultimate Aviator Rescue.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger and his nephew accidentally send a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol gets superpowers from the meteor's golden energy.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: The New Guppy!
programme.desc: The Sea Witch steals the Guppies' magical jewels so she can rule the Seven Seas! Will the Guppies get their jewels back, and stop her before it's too late?

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Giant Chicken/ Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born Again Krabs/ Safety Freak SpongeBob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs refuses to let SpongeBob throw away a mouldy Krabby Patty under the grill.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Artist Unknown/ Spy Buddies
programme.desc: When SpongeBob enrolls in Squidward's art class, Squidward wants to teach strictly. SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to spy on Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Spongebuard on Duty
programme.desc: When Larry the Lobster is short one man for lifeguard duty, SpongeBob volunteers. Mr. Krabs tells SpongeBob and Patrick to paint his living room with permanent paint.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Secret Exhibit
programme.desc: From hang gliding with a Pteranodon to a high-speed game of chicken with a T-Rex, Owen and Claire are determined to deliver the dinosaurs to the new exhibit on time, but park worker Danny Nedermeyer has other plans for the duo and Jurassic World.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Invasion of the Dads
programme.desc: Timmy's previous wish for a Planet of Dads backfires when the Dads realize the one thing missing from their lives is Mom, and they come to steal her away from Dad and Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy gives Mom and Dad superpowers; Timmy wishes he could go to the real Middle Ages.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco
programme.desc: Annoyed by Spongebob for the last time, Squidward issues him a restraining order. Plankton steals a Krabby Patty from the Krusty Krab unaware it's really an art piece by famous artist Fiasco.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure
programme.desc: Sandy and SpongeBob get into a fierce competition doing extreme underwater sports.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward redecorate his house. / Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Flu-ouise

programme.title: Modern Family: Tableau Vivant
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria get on each other's nerves while trying to order lunch at their local diner, Phil is put in the position of having to fire Mitchell, and Cam and Claire have opposing theories on how to discipline children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Gloria accompanies Cam and Mitch as a translator for their newest adoption. Jay and Manny bring Lily to her dance recital, while Claire and Phil have a proud parenting moment when they send Alex off to her first prom.

programme.desc: Jay's birthday is coming up, and he makes it well-known that he wishes to keep it as low key as possible. Phil takes Jay on a very unconventional fishing trip with his buddies, and Gloria struggles with how to break the pregnancy news to him.

programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past

programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic but Phil cannot accept it. Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms include snoring and she is keeping the whole house up.

programme.title: Bones: The Plain in the Prodigy
programme.desc: When human remains are found alongside the railroad, Brennan and Booth are called to the case. The bones belong to Levi Yoder, a piano prodigy and a member of the Amish community who disappeared roughly two months prior to his Rumspringa.

programme.title: Bones: The Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate human remains found at a neighbourhood block party. Suburban politics and secret scandals give each neighbour in the cul-de-sac a motive, leaving Brennan, Booth and Sweets to sift through the drama to find their suspect.

programme.title: Bones: A Night at the Bones Museum
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth are called to investigate what appears to be charred human remains on an electrical fence. The mysterious corpse is later determined to be a mummified Egyptian royal, but the mystery deepens when a curator is murdered.

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of District Attorney Harvey Dent and Lieutenant James Gordon, Batman battles a madman known as the Joker who causes terror and mayhem for fun.

programme.title: Arrow: The Magician
programme.desc: A furious Nyssa confronts Oliver about Sara, when Oliver learns Malcolm Merlyn is alive, he suspects Merlyn killed Sara. Oliver and Nyssa join forces to go after the Dark Archer, intent on bringing Sara's killer to justice.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek the Third

programme.desc: A small house on a big lot has the team seeing dollar signs, with plans to split the property and build not one, but two houses for an epic payday. When the split goes bust - taking their profits with it.

programme.title: Live Rescue
programme.desc: Firefighters, paramedics and EMTs across the country bravely put their lives on the line responding to emergency calls.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Ava
programme.desc: Terry leaves Jake in charge of entertaining his pregnant wife, Sharon, while he and Rosa head to Rikers to learn more about the Douglass Street murders. But when Sharon's water breaks sooner than expected, crisis ensues at the precinct.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Swedes
programme.desc: In an attempt to solve an international case, Jake and Rosa are forced to work with a pair of Swedish cops and things get very competitive very quickly. Meanwhile, Amy and Terry offer to help Gina prepare for a big test.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Yippie Kayak
programme.desc: Jake, Charles and Gina are involved in a real-life 'Die Hard' situation while off-duty on Christmas Eve, and Terry must leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Meanwhile, Amy tries to prove she’s just as tough as Holt and Rosa.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Hostage Situation
programme.desc: Charles and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife, Eleanor, steamrolls their plans. Meanwhile, Amy asks Terry to write a recommendation letter with disastrous results.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: 9 Days
programme.desc: When Captain Holt and Jake accidentally contract the mumps during an investigation, they decide to be quarantined together in hopes of still solving the case. Meanwhile, Rosa tries to help Boyle through a mourning process.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Cruise
programme.desc: Jake and Amy are excited to go on their first real vacation together, but Amy's perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover an old adversary is on board with them.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Where's the Beefcake
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tries to take nudity out of the annual Firefighters' Beefcake Calendar and the crew must get creative to maintain the integrity of its sexy (and oily) tradition.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi
programme.desc: The police captain catches Eddie sleeping with his wife before the Tacoma charity boxing match and challenges him to be the main event.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: The Bees and the Bees
programme.desc: Matteo Lane wants to talk about the bees and the bees, JP McDade does a killer Trump impression, and Tone Bell has a specific organ to donate.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout
programme.desc: Three comics enter into a battle of high stakes comedic one-upmanship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Funny Joints
programme.desc: Gina Yashere knows about black people who listen to country music, Kevin McCaffrey reacts to his pics, and Julian McCullough pays Kevin a potato-themed insult.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Grandfathers of Anarchy
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz knows what a drug dealer shouldn't say, Gina Yashere talks juice cleanses, and Matteo Lane has an Easter bunny he'd swipe right for.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up
programme.desc: Find out what food Clayton English describes as 'edible gentrification,' what Julian McCullough thinks you shouldn't say when you're Amish, and what Jessimae Peluso steals from an audience member.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: A Glittery Shoe
programme.desc: Sean Patton, Casey James Salengo, and Mehran Khaghani perform.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Malls
programme.desc: Adam and Emily go on a shopping spree of knowledge, where he illustrates that malls were created as tax loopholes for greedy developers and are now crumbling under their own weight.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Find out what happened when a scorpion got loose during magic rehearsal, what money truck sent the crew scrambling and what fruity trick had a British influence.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Top Priority of NASA
programme.desc: Find out what left a foul smell in our production office, how Michael met one of his current magic team members, and why Michael pretends to be hard of hearing. Plus, we have unaired footage.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Find out what trick required the camera operator to hide inside a box for the entire day and how the show got its name.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp

programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2

programme.desc: Leslie makes a public appeal for park design suggestions, but becomes suspicious when the best design comes from an architect in Eagleton. Meanwhile, Tom enlists the help of the office as he sets up his 'Rent-a-Swag' business.

programme.desc: Ron, Diane and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after Ron receives a nomination.

programme.desc: Ann throws a bachelorette party for Leslie and Chris throws a game night at Ben's.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann's Decision

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After managing to escape the lethal Hunger Games arena not once but twice, Katniss Everdeen shelters in the hidden District 13 while the people she love remain under threat from the Capitol. With the help of her friends, she prepares to save Peeta.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Done Right
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into food made the right way, including clam cakes and cheesefries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew relive the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. They recall unforgettable crews, over-the-top guests and the real action down below.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Phenomenon

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Badlands Guardian

programme.desc: A weekly program focusing on the politics of telecommunications through conversations with the people who shape the digital future.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: He dreamed of being the next Steve Jobs, a young entrepreneur who wanted to change the world. But his world came crashing down one morning with four gunshots. This was a crime of passion: a fatal triangle involving a husband, a wife and a boss.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: Nona Dirksmeyer was a young beauty queen with a boyfriend she adored. They were planning a future together. Then, Nona was brutally killed. The crime shook her hometown and exposed someone with a secret past.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Williams
programme.desc: Michelle seemed to have a perfect life of wealth and success, until her husband is found shot in his own bed.

programme.title: Snapped: Kimberly Cargill
programme.desc: A mother’s love is put to a test after a dead body is found in a small town in Texas and she is faced with the death sentence.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: They were two beautiful families living out their dreams, but gunshots in a parking lot revealed an ugly truth. Investigators uncovered three lives tangled in a love triangle. There were many secrets, but which one was the key to solving the mystery?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Snapped: Beverly McColm
programme.desc: After police discover a philanthropic entrepreneur shot dead in his home, a surprise visit from a stranger attending his funeral takes detectives down an unexpected path to reveal a sweet yet deceptive killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Geraldine Jones
programme.desc: After a young mother disappears with a woman claiming to be a social worker, an investigation into her whereabouts ends in a gruesome discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Khan
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a successful business manager and expecting father leads Texas detectives to a seedy underworld and a spiteful killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Dillard
programme.desc: A young mother of two on her way to a birthday party is gunned down on the side of a rural highway. The ensuing investigation reveals fraying within a tight-knit family.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Jones-Orock
programme.desc: Police in a small Pennsylvania town respond to an eyewitness report of a murder behind a grocery store and find that the victim is no stranger to law enforcement.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Pieringer
programme.desc: When the bodies of two grandparents are tragically found left for dead, investigators toil to determine whether the slayings were motivated by simmering vengeance or insatiable greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Maryann Castorena
programme.desc: A body found in the snow leads to an ex-girlfriend, an unlikely clue and a secret marriage.

programme.title: Snapped: Sarah Kolb

programme.title: Snapped: Kari Willoughby

programme.title: Snapped: Alisha Noel-Murray
programme.desc: After a man is shot just a few feet inside his New York home, the ensuing investigation brings to light a murder-for-hire plot spurred by greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Verina Childs
programme.desc: A hunter's death has authorities tracking a killer, but the trail leads surprisingly close to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Flanagan

programme.title: Snapped: Ruby Ann Ruffolo
programme.desc: A discovery in the woods leads police to a troubled marriage, a drug overdose and a deadly plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Selena: The Death of a Superstar
programme.desc: When Latin pop star Selena is found bleeding to death in a hotel lobby, authorities begin to suspect that Yolanda Saldivar, her number one fan and close friend, may not have been as loyal as Selena thought.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Ava

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Swedes

programme.desc: Jake and Amy are excited to go on their first real vacation together, but Amy's perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover an old adversary is on board with them.

programme.desc: When human remains are found alongside the railroad, Brennan and Booth are called to the case. The bones belong to Levi Yoder, a piano prodigy and a member of the Amish community who disappeared roughly two months prior to his Rumspringa.

programme.title: Bones: The Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate human remains found at a neighbourhood block party. Suburban politics and secret scandals give each neighbour in the cul-de-sac a motive, leaving Brennan, Booth and Sweets to sift through the drama to find their suspect.

programme.title: Arrow: The Magician

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.desc: A young girl befriends a giant who she calls the BFG, the Big Friendly Giant. When the other giants attack him in order to eat her, she and the BFG try to convince Queen Victoria that giants exist in order to get her help to get rid of the evil giants.

programme.title: Movie: Batman Begins
programme.desc: As a boy, Bruce Wayne watched helplessly as his parents were murdered in front of him. Determined to get revenge, he studies with a dangerous ninja cult leader and, upon his return to Gotham City, uses his skills against the criminal underworld.

programme.title: American Dad!: Bush Comes to Dinner
programme.desc: When Stan enters an essay-writing contest to have his personal hero, President Bush, come over for dinner, he is overcome with joy when the president arrives at his doorstep. However, not everyone in the Smith family shares Stan's excitement.

programme.title: American Dad!: The American Dream Factory
programme.desc: Stan decides to turn to his lifelong ambition of making teddy bears when he realizes that making a quick profit takes a lot of work. He resorts to using illegal aliens as cheap labour, upsetting Hayley, who decides to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Family Guy: A Hero Sits Next Door

programme.title: Family Guy: The Son Also Draws

programme.title: Movie: Doctor Strange

programme.title: Movie: San Andreas

programme.title: Movie: Head of State

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Debra at the Lodge

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Above Exalted Cyclops
programme.desc: Chelsea sets Alan up on a blind date with her new friend, Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sir Lancelot's Litter Box
programme.desc: Charlie mourns the loss of his bachelor pad after reluctantly agreeing to let Chelsea move in. Meanwhile, Alan finds that there's not much space left for him in the house.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Attention Deficit
programme.desc: Doug's so busy planning his Super Bowl party that he forgets about Carrie's work problems.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Prints Charming
programme.desc: After accidentally picking up another couple's photos, Doug and Carrie feel that their lives are boring.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Animal Attraction

programme.title: The King of Queens: Golden Moldy

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Good Morning Mrs. Butterworth

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Whipped Unto the Third Generation
programme.desc: When Charlie's fiancée, Chelsea, convinces him to let Melissa, Alan's girlfriend, move in, the girls take over the house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: La Biblioteca Es Libros
programme.desc: Beverly cannot believe Adam is failing Spanish class and blames his teacher. Beverly speaks with Senora Taraborelli and pays her to tutor Adam instead of putting him in remedial Spanish.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Just Say No
programme.desc: As the presidential election approaches, Erica finds herself strongly supporting candidate Walter Mondale. After learning Beverly always votes for whomever Murray tells her to vote for, Erica sets out to educate her mother.

programme.title: Roseanne: Guilt by Imagination

programme.title: Roseanne: Homecoming
programme.desc: Becky and Mark return for the reunion of Dan's football team, but there's trouble afoot.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Roseanne gets carried away with her punishment of D.J., who seems headed for delinquency.

programme.title: Roseanne: Suck Up or Shut Up
programme.desc: When Roseanne joins a stuffy women's group with the intention of increasing business at the diner, it puts D.J. in a tough spot with a schoolmate. Meanwhile, Becky and Mark squabble over Mark's attendance at school.

programme.title: Roseanne: Busted
programme.desc: Dan tries to act as peacemaker between Becky and Mark. Roseanne heads to Chicago when she learns David and Darlene are living together.

programme.title: Roseanne: David vs. Goliath
programme.desc: David admits that he was living with Darlene in Chicago and gets kicked out of the house.

programme.title: Roseanne: Everyone Comes to Jackie's
programme.desc: Roseanne wants David to move back with them, and Dan never wants to see him again.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Room for Daddy

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Roseanne and pregnant Jackie visit a gay bar with Nancy and her friend, Sharon, Roseanne feels pretty smug and cool - until she is overwhelmed by a surprisingly affectionate admirer.

programme.title: Roseanne: Labor Day
programme.desc: The usual symptoms - panic, pain and incredible joy - announce the imminent arrival of Jackie's child. Even though Fred is the father, Roseanne struggles to limit his participation in the process.

programme.title: Roseanne: Past Imperfect
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan have different ideas about covering one of Dan's father's missed alimony payments. Meanwhile, new parents, Fred and Jackie, still can't figure out whether they love each other or not.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me

programme.title: Roseanne: I Pray the Lord My Stove to Keep
programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.desc: Porcupines Roxie and Henning have had a new baby porcupette, but living alongside eleven meerkats means that the new arrival will need to stay calm. Also, when he finally plucks up the courage to face the mob, he ends up on an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: Tanked!: Urijah Faber's Ultimate Fish Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett create not one but two knock out aquariums. MMA fighter Urijah Faber just opened his new gym and wants a little bit of the ocean inside, specifically a puffer. A couple hosts a party for The Marine Aquarium Convention.

programme.title: Tanked!: Kurt Busch's Tank-a-Dega 500
programme.desc: ATM start your engines because NASCAR driver Kurt Busch wants to get tanked. Kurt and his wife are requesting a little piece of paradise inside their aquarium. They want to replicate their wedding location.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wildfire Heroes Tank
programme.desc: Coddingtown Center in Santa Rosa have tasked the guys with a very special tank. To kick off their new remodel, they want Wayde and Brett to make a tank that pays respects to the heroes that helped the area during the recent wildfires.

programme.title: Tanked!: Healing Garden Waterfall
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even BIGGER and BETTER than the original. Closer to home, the guys get asked to build a custom acrylic waterfall as part of a memorial in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: All in the Ocean
programme.desc: Atlantic City is in for a 'fish lift.' Ocean Casino Resort wants to bring the ocean into 'Ocean.' The 6,000-gallon aquarium has ATM team literally burning through panels to get this job done.

programme.title: Tanked!: Mel's Drive In Tank
programme.desc: California restaurant Mel's Drive In wants a tank for their new location in Santa Monica. The owners want a nostalgic feel and a ton of insert pieces that represent Mel's storied history, while pointing to the restaurant's future.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Death Star
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star. New evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space. When a cuting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot. Recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah. A missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Class Begins

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Finding the Cop Voice
programme.desc: Rookie Dennis Cooper has a chance to use his cop voice, but will he?

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Amy Gellert?
programme.desc: Amy Gellert was just 21 when she interrupted an intruder holding he parents hostage in their Florida home. Startled by the headlights of her car, the man brutally stabbed her parents and then killed her. Her parents survived, but Amy never made it inside.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: Murder Board: The Scalp Hunter
programme.desc: People fishing in a London canal are horrified when they reel in an old gym bag containing a collection of dismembered human body parts. Police realize they have serial killer on their hands who may have been murdering women across Europe for years.

programme.title: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: An intruder finds his way into a home and takes hostages in the basement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Stolen Life
programme.desc: John Walsh explores the case of youthful con man Edgardo Perez, who allegedly preyed on older men until it turned deadly. Then, Callahan Walsh travels to Boulder to talk to a child predator.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Conquering the Sky
programme.desc: This episode exposes the myths about the Wright brothers' invention of the airplane and America's favorite missing person, Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Wingshooting USA: Phun for Everyone
programme.desc: Gratitude is something we often overlook, but Dave Olsen at South Dakota's Pheasant Phun lodge gives us reason to reflect on what's really important in life. Enjoying the places, people, and incredible country we hunt in are high on Dave's list.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Ready-to-Flip Ranch
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an owner in Anaheim, California, looking to sell their three bedroom, two bathroom home. These kind of houses are quick and easy to flip, exactly what the duo are looking for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Million Dollar Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find short a sale listing for a large home in upscale neighbourhood. With asking price below a million dollars, this would be the most expensive flip they have taken on.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: It's a Dump
programme.desc: Flipping team Tarek and Christina purchase and flip dilapidated properties.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Additional Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, CA, with tons of potential. To justify their investment, they decide to add a bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Money Mirage
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a tri-level house in Irvine, CA, buying it sight unseen. The neighborhood is hot, but the house needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Bucktown Rebuild
programme.desc: Alison Victoria buys a rundown historic home in the heart of Chicago. This Windy City home comes with many surprises, however, and when the house unexpectedly has to be taken down to the studs.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Historical Headache
programme.desc: A tip from a friend lands Alison and Donovan one of the first landmarked cottages in the Ukrainian Village of Chicago. They hope to restore it to its former glory, but strict historical build guidelines and expensive property loss hamper plans.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take their chances on a split-level home that is full of disasters. Faced with numerous setbacks, they must put their differences aside to turn the nightmare into a dream home for potential buyers.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Fit to Reno
programme.desc: After moving from city to city to grow their businesses, a couple is settling down in Las Vegas, NV. Drew is determined to put an end to their moving streak, but the husband's low-ball offer threatens to derail a great deal.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: After years of being on the road, Sonja has finally landed a job closer to family in Nashville, and her sister Michelle helps make her house hunt a priority.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Gambles and Jackpots
programme.desc: Newlyweds sacrifice their honeymoon to find a dream home, but after visiting over 150 properties, they need an intervention. Drew leads the home search, while Jonathan pulls off a jaw-dropping renovation.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Family Above All Else
programme.desc: After moving back to his hometown of Nashville to be closer to family, a couple's home search has taken longer than expected. They're desperate to get out of his childhood bedroom and into a kid-friendly dream home of their own.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Classic Home vs. Eclectic Suite
programme.desc: Gary and Jerry win a large house at auction but must split the house in half in order to take it on the road. As they renovate the larger house, they enlist Gary's girls to help renovate the smaller piece as a mother-in-law suite.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Divided Domicile
programme.desc: After cutting their house in half for the move, the Snow Sisters get creative putting the house back together and decide to add on in the middle of the two structures. They turn the home into the perfect country getaway for a family.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Shotgun Shanty Vs. Hayhurst Brothers' Garden District Digs
programme.desc: The Hayhurst brothers win a house at auction, but after the move, unseen rot under the house leaves them with only half of it.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Tuscan Abode
programme.desc: Casey & Catrina get a good buy on a 2 bed 1 bath home in Denton, TX. Casey is anticipating an easy move and Catrina wants to build an addition to get more bedroom and bathroom space. Together they decide to draw on the house's original character.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Cozy Cottage vs. Gary's Girls' Architectural Abode
programme.desc: HD Snow calls on his family to renovate a couple of storage houses he has on his moving yard. Donna and Toni take one house while Gary's girls take the other as the friendly family competition begins. Both teams plan to reuse some of the homes' contents.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Americana Style Design
programme.desc: Paige and Raf renovate an old army barracks they won at an auction in Aledo, Texas. Military accents help to keep the original Americana spirit of the barracks as it is being transformed into a stylish and functional home.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.
